urdu transliteration text:
AAO TABOOT MOHAMMAD KA UTHAAO LOGOOH PEOPLE, COME AND CARRY THE COFFIN OF MUHAMMADEnglish Transliteration
@HujjatELC

SAARI DUNIYA KO WAFADARI, SIKHAAO LOGOAAO TABOOT MOHAMMAD KA UTHAO LOGO
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
TEACH THE WHOLE WORLD THE MEANING OF LOYALTY,
OH PEOPLE, COME AND CARRY THE COFFIN OF MUHAMMAD

urdu transliteration text:
JIS AQEEDAT SE BAPA KARTE HO MILAD E NABIFARSH E GHUM WESE MOHAMMAD KA, BICHAAO LOGO
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
WITH THE DEVOTION YOU CELEBRATE THE BIRTH OF THE PROPHET,
O PEOPLE, IN THE SAME WAY COMMEMORATE THE DEMISE OF MUHAMMAD

urdu transliteration text:
YE SAFAY GHUM HAI MOHAMMAD KI YAHA(N) FARK NAHIHA ISI SAFF PE ZAMAANE KO, BULAAO LOGO
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
THIS IS A GATHERING TO MOURN FOR THE PROPHET,
O PEOPLE, INVITE EVERYONE TO THIS GATHERING TO MOURN FOR MUHAMMAD (SAW)
THERE IS DARKNESS IN THE HOUSE OF FATIMA (AS)

urdu transliteration text:
KHAAKE PATTHAR BHI JO UMMAT KO DUA DETE RAHEAISE MOHSIN KA NA EHSAAN, BHULAAO LOGO
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
EVEN AFTER BEING STONED, HE CARRIED ON PRAYING FOR THE UMMAH
O PEOPLE, NEVER FORGET THE FAVOURS OF THIS BENEVOLENT MAN
O PEOPLE, SHED TEARS FOR ZAHRA HAS BECOME AN ORPHAN NOW

urdu transliteration text:
GHUM MEIN MAZLOOM KE RONA HAI NABI KI SUNNATYE HAQIQAT NA ZAMANE SE, CHUPAAO LOGO
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
IT IS THE SUNNAH OF THE PROPHET TO CRY FOR THE OPPRESSED
O PEOPLE, DO NOT HIDE THIS REALITY FROM ANYONE

urdu transliteration text:
KYU HO KHAMOSH BAQAIYYA KE UJAR JAANE PARAPNE SARKAAR KO AISE NA, RULAAO LOGO
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
WHY ARE YOU QUIET AFTER THE DESTRUCTION OF BAQEE
O PEOPLE, DO NOT MAKE THE PROPHET CRY
SHE USED TO CRY SECRETLY AFTER BEING SEPARATED FROM HER FATHER

urdu transliteration text:
BAAD BABA KE JISE HAQ NA MILA DUNIYA SEUSKE HAQ KE LIYE AWAAZ, UTHAAO LOGO
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
AFTER HER FATHER’S DEATH, SHE DID NOT GET WHAT WAS RIGHTFULLY HERS,
O PEOPLE, FOR THIS RIGHT OF HERS SPEAK UP
